ksa_text: Implement and maintain security measures to mitigate or remediate identified vulnerabilities and security risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure all acquisitions, procurements, and outsourcing efforts address information security requirements consistent with organization goals.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nice.top_element_label: Integrate security requirements into application design elements

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-008 (SP, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4403 is insufficient to establish relevance to quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.440, ddat=0.435, dcwf=0.433) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4403 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-T-008 (composite 0.4403) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.4403 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.4403 is not a standard requirement for Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4403, domain SP, scope weak fit. High confidence.
